text.title: Autofix-vs-Flag Decision Rule for Coding Agents Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent ran ruff --fix on a repo with no tests; runtime regression in prod.
antipattern.root-cause: No precondition check for test existence.
antipattern.fix: Gate: detect tests; if none, flag-only.

antipattern.symptom: Agent applied every available autofix; PR is 2000 lines of mixed changes; review impossible.
antipattern.fix: Bound to 50 lines OR single rule ID; split into multiple PRs.

antipattern.symptom: Audit can't tell which fixes were applied automatically vs flagged.
antipattern.fix: Emit JSONL decision record per finding.
